name: One Time Migration
description: Initial transfer of selected Microsoft Teams data, including channels, direct messages, messages, files, and supported metadata, into the destination Chat space. Preserves message history, sender information, and supported formatting.

name: Delta Migration
description: Transfers only new or updated data created in Microsoft Teams after the One-Time Migration. Ensures the destination Chat space stays up to date.

name: Public Channels
description: Migrates all public channels with complete message history, files, replies, mentions, and supported metadata. All public channels are migrated as Private channels in the destination Chat.

name: Non-Admin Public Channels
description: Public channels where the admin is not a member are supported for migration with full message history and files. Migrated as Private channels in the destination Chat.

name: Private Channels
description: Migrates all private channels with message history, files, replies, mentions, and membership preserved. Migrated as Private channels in the destination Chat.

name: Non-Admin Private Channels
description: Private channels where the admin does not have direct access are supported through backend permissions. Migrated as Private channels.

name: Channel Members
description: Ensures all channel members are correctly mapped and added in the destination space with preserved permissions.

name: Channel Mentions
description: During Teams to Chat migration, channel mentions are migrated as normal text. When the same channel is mentioned within that channel, it is migrated as @all in the destination chat.

name: User Mentions
description: User mentions (@username) are migrated, except for unmapped users. Unmapped user mentions migrate as plain text.

name: Members Posted Username
description: Displays the original message author. Active/inactive/external/deactivated user handling as per migration rules.

name: Channel Description
description: Channel descriptions are migrated and visible in the destination cloud.

name: Archived Channels
description: Archived channels are migrated with full message history; only the channel creator is added initially.

name: Replies in Channels
description: Replies from Microsoft Teams are migrated to the destination Chat space and preserved as replies within the same conversation thread.

name: Group DMs
description: Migrates multi-user direct message conversations securely.

name: Non-Admin Group DMs
description: Group DMs without admin participation are supported.

name: One-on-One DMs
description: All one-to-one conversations are migrated with timestamps and message attribution.

name: Non-Admin One-on-One DMs
description: One-on-one DMs where admin is not involved are included.

name: Self DMs
description: Messages sent by users to themselves are not migrated, because the chat cloud does not support self-Messages.

name: Members Posted Username (DMs)
description: Preserves original sender information for each DM.

name: DM Members
description: All DM participants are correctly mapped and added.

name: User Mentions in DMs
description: User mentions inside DMs are retained where mapping exists.

name: Replies in Direct Messages
description: Replies in DMs are migrated as individual messages due to platform constraints.

name: Bold
description: Bold text formatting from Microsoft Teams is preserved during migration.

name: Italic
description: Italic text formatting from Microsoft Teams is preserved during migration.

name: Strikethrough
description: Strikethrough formatting from Microsoft Teams is preserved during migration.

name: Code Block
description: Code block formatting from Microsoft Teams is not preserved during migration.

name: Emojis
description: Emojis from Microsoft Teams are successfully migrated and displayed in Chat.

name: Links
description: Hyperlinks shared in Microsoft Teams are migrated successfully and remain clickable in Chat.

name: Ordered List
description: Ordered lists from Microsoft Teams are preserved during migration.

name: Bullet List
description: Bulleted lists from Microsoft Teams are preserved during migration.

name: All Types of Files
description: All supported file types are migrated with size limitations. When multiple files are posted in one message, only one is migrated as file; remaining as links.

name: Files Posted from Drive / SharePoint
description: Migrated as links when direct upload is not supported.

name: GIFs
description: Animated GIFs are preserved. Migrated as links.

name: Stickers
description: Stickers are migrated where supported. When multiple stickers are in one message, one migrates as sticker and remaining as links.

name: Custom Stickers
description: Custom stickers are migrated based on destination support. Same multi-attachment behavior as stickers.

name: Screenshots
description: Screen shots are successfully migrating for Teams to Chat in both Channels and Direct Messages based on supported availability.

name: Screen Recordings
description: Screen recordings are successfully migrating in both Channels and Direct Messages based on supported availability.

name: Recorded Video Clips
description: Recorded video clips are successfully migrating across both Channels and Direct Messages, based on supported availability.
